12. ! [X0] : (binge_watches(karen,X0) | ~is_netflix_show(X0) | ~is_popular(X0)) [flattening 11]
14. ! [X0] : (shares_with_lisa(karen,X0) | (~is_netflix_show(X0) | ~binge_watches(karen,X0))) [ennf transformation 7]
15. ! [X0] : (shares_with_lisa(karen,X0) | ~is_netflix_show(X0) | ~binge_watches(karen,X0)) [flattening 14]
17. is_netflix_show(stranger_things) [cnf transformation 1]
18. is_popular(stranger_things) [cnf transformation 2]
19. binge_watches(karen,X0) | ~is_netflix_show(X0) | ~is_popular(X0) [cnf transformation 12]

25. ~shares_with_lisa(karen,stranger_things) [cnf transformation 10]
32. ~is_netflix_show(X0) | shares_with_lisa(karen,X0) | ~is_netflix_show(X0) | ~is_popular(X0) [resolution 24,19]
33. shares_with_lisa(karen,X0) | ~is_netflix_show(X0) | ~is_popular(X0) [duplicate literal removal 32]
34. ~is_netflix_show(stranger_things) | ~is_popular(stranger_things) [resolution 33,25]
